catalysts.thesis: High-conviction PEAD play following strong Q4 2025 earnings beat reported pre-market today (Feb 24).
catalysts.catalyst_details: Reported Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 24, 2026. Revenue $243.8M (+21% YoY) beat estimates. 'Strong' financial results with full-year 2026 revenue guidance >$1B.
catalysts.absorption_status: News released pre-market Feb 24. Stock is up ~5.2% from lows, indicating the move is not yet exhausted (<8% rule satisfied). Institutional absorption likely to continue through the session.
catalysts.recency_proof: Press Release Feb 24, 2026: 'Harmony Biosciences Reports Strong 2025 Financial Results'.
catalysts.risk: Gap fade if broader market weakens.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Stock is trading at ~9x P/E despite 20%+ growth; market has not fully priced in the $1B+ revenue guidance for 2026.

catalysts.thesis: Pre-PDUFA run-up play targeting the March 6, 2026 decision date. Technical breakout forming ahead of binary event.
catalysts.catalyst_details: FDA PDUFA target action date set for March 6, 2026. Market anticipation building for potential approval.
catalysts.absorption_status: Price consolidation around $73 suggests accumulation. Low float relative to institutional interest.
catalysts.recency_proof: FDA Calendar confirms March 6, 2026 PDUFA date.
catalysts.risk: Regulatory delay or CRL (Complete Response Letter).
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Stock is trading well below 52-week high ($111) despite approaching catalyst; implied volatility rising.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Rising chatter on biotech lists regarding March catalysts.

catalysts.thesis: Earnings run-up/positioning play ahead of report After Market Close today (Feb 24). Strong momentum from previous quarter beat.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Reporting Q4 2025 earnings after close Feb 24, 2026. Consensus EPS estimate ~$6.49. Previous beat was +41%.
catalysts.absorption_status: Trading near recent highs ($166), showing strength into the print. Unpriced potential for guidance raise.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Analysts have raised targets recently; steady insider buying reported in previous months.
